signals.headline: Recent developments (April 21, 2026):** Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated he would remain in his position until
signals.raw: Recent developments (April 21, 2026):** Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated he would remain in his position until a successor is confirmed and an ongoing criminal investigation into the Fed is resolved[2]. Powell's term as chair ends in May, with Kevin Warsh nominated but not yet confirmed by the Senate[2].
